Prof. Dr. Ahmet Deniz Yücekaya Receives TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 Grant

We are pleased to announce that the project titled “Integrated Resource Management for Natural Gas Power Plants” by Prof. Dr. Ahmet Deniz Yücekaya, one of our esteemed Industrial Engineering faculty members, has been awarded support under the TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 Program.

We congratulate our professor and wish him success in his research.
